title: Deeper Island Biodiversity
description: Moving toward the center of the island brings more biodiversity - and more danger. Creatures become more exotic and monstrous. Resources may be richer but risks are higher. Each layer presents new flora, fauna, and threats.
definition-of-done: Multiple biome layers with increasing biodiversity. Creature danger scales with depth. Unique resources available at deeper layers. Visual distinction between layers.
testing-plan: Verify biome layer transitions. Test creature danger scaling. Verify unique resources per layer. Test visual layer distinctions.
